name: IPhone 15 Pro
description: Apple iPhone 15 Pro, 256GB, Titanium rang. A17 Pro chip va mukammal kameralar bilan.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra, 512GB, qora rang. AI funksiyalari va ajoyib zoom kameraga ega.

name: MacBook Air M3
description: Apple MacBook Air 13-inch, M3 chip, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD. Yengil va kuchli noutbuk.

name: AirPods Pro 2
description: Apple AirPods Pro 2-avlod. Faol shovqin bekor qilish va zo'r ovoz sifati.
